title: skopeo[.]org website
body:
I found this website https://skopeo[.]org which is "advertising" skopeo but claims to not be associated with the official project. It also seems mostly AI generated including fake user recommendations.
It currently links to the official repo / [code](https://github.com/containers/skopeo/archive/refs/heads/main.zip) in one place.

I did not look deeper into it, but I'm afraid that it will serve malware in the future, especially because there at no details about the author to be found.

comments.body:
see https://github.com/podman-container-tools/skopeo/issues/2896

The site does get blocked by cloudflare already for me, it shows it as "Suspected Malware"

As said on the other issue the only official domains we own are podman.io and buildah.io, anything else is not official.

Not sure what we can do here really, I guess we could add a note in the Readme file to mention that the only official project domains are podman.io/buildah.io.

I guess maybe we should reach out to some CNCF people to see if there is something else they can do, i.e. try to get the domain taken down.

Though looking at the site it does say it at the botttom

> Not affiliated with Skopeo. This is an independent site providing documentation, guides and links to the official project repositories. For official releases visit GitHub

Ah well searching for issues with the actual domain obviously didn't yield any results.

Feel free to close this :)

> I guess maybe we should reach out to some CNCF people to see if there is something else they can do, i.e. try to get the domain taken down.

@Luap99 have you done this already? If not, I'd say we should. There's no guarantee that they won't do something malicious in the future. cc @podman-container-tools/skopeo-maintainers

yes I created a ticket with the legal team there based on the recommendation I got but so far no reply on the ticket.
https://cncfservicedesk.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/1/CNCFSD-3613 (private, should only for podman CNCF maintainers accessible)
